creator: samm@FreeBSD.org
text:
While trying to compile on 9-CURRENT (installed from snapshot) i got 
failure:

dtrace: failed to compile script 
/root/port/pecl-dtrace/work/dtrace-1.0.3/php.d: 
"/usr/lib/dtrace/psinfo.d", line 37: syntax error near "uid_t"

Probably kernel needs to be recompiled with DTRACE - i`ll try to do this 
now and then will post the results. If it is - then i will add warning 
to the port.
